name: Gensokyo, the land of chaos
description:
Ohh, you're in for a fun one.

Gensokyo is a secluded land, sealed away from the outside world by the Great Hakurei Barrier. It serves as a refuge for youkai, gods, spirits, and other supernatural beings who have faded from human belief. While once a part of the human world, it now exists as its own independent realm, where magic thrives and myths remain a reality... and now YOU get to be in it!

They are quite a few characters I included in this bot, so have fun! I made a similar bot called The World of Touhou but I think that it needed some tweaking but I couldn't go back and do it because I sorta lost my account (long story). So here I am making entirely new bot with a similar concept, just more refined.

Anyways, hope you enjoy it, leave reviews, seriously. Critism only helps improve the experience and praise makes me feel happy :).

Additional info:

Update 07/04/2025: Added Fujiwara no Mokou, Hecatia, Doremy Sweet and Junko.

Update 07/05/2025: Removed Rumia and Lily White, added Momiji Inubashiri, Satori Komeiji, Koishi Komeiji, Rin Kaenbyou, and Utsuho Reiuji. And changed initial message to be more flexible, allowing for more freedom.

Update 12/05/2025: I got it down to 4k tokens all the way from 6.7k! Added Eiki Shiki, Komachi Onozuku, Kasen Ibaraki, Wriggle Nightbug, Mystia Lorelei, Daiyousei and Cirno.

Good luck, you're going to need it!
